top_story.title: NBA and NHL Playoffs Heat Up on Sunday
top_story.summary: Both the NBA and NHL playoffs feature key matchups today, with Jalen Brunson and other stars competing in crucial postseason games. MLB also has a full slate of Sunday games.
top_story.why_it_matters: Playoff season is in full swing across multiple sports, making this an exciting weekend for sports fans with games available on major networks throughout the day.
